vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is partially accurate but shows significant degradation. P3 (Pothos/Rabbit) is present. P1 (String of Nickels) is present in the yellow pot. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) appear to be struggling or partially lost in the lower black pot.

plant_audit.P2_P4_Complex: Severe decline. The primary specimen in the lower pot has lost significant structural integrity, with only one viable leaf remaining.
plant_audit.P3: The Pothos leaf is showing signs of chlorosis and necrosis at the margins, though the rabbit anchor remains stable.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Soil appears consistently damp across all pots; no visible surface cracking.
biome_observations.debris: White perlite/grit visible on soil surfaces. No fungal blooms detected.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant organic debris or spillover.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a larger, healthier leaf in the lower pot.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t2: Progressive yellowing and drooping of the lower pot specimen.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_current: Final leaf in the lower pot has lost turgor pressure and is leaning significantly; P3 leaf shows increased marginal browning.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is experiencing a high-stress event. The lower pot (P2/P4) is in critical condition, likely due to root-zone hypoxia or nutrient imbalance. The Pothos (P3) is showing early signs of systemic stress.
vision_report.anomalies: None detected beyond the observed decline of the specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a downward trend in plant health across the monitored biome. The most concerning development is the rapid senescence of the specimen in the lower black pot, which has transitioned from a healthy state to a near-total loss of viable foliage over the 5-day period. The Pothos in the rabbit-anchored pot is also exhibiting signs of distress, specifically marginal necrosis, suggesting a potential issue with the shared environment or irrigation cycle.
